title: Little Incrementisle
description:
Little Incrementisle is an incremental colony-building game where you land on one wild island after another. On each island, you gather resources, construct buildings, recruit villagers, and develop your colony, until you’re ready to set sail for the next one.

Each new island brings its own modifiers (bonuses and penalties to production, costs, and wait times) and a unique event to overcome: an earthquake, a flood, a pirate raid... Between expeditions, you spend prestige points on a permanent talent tree that follows you from journey to journey.

The goal: Go after THE piece, venturing ever further into the archipelago, while managing your resources, anticipating disasters, and optimizing your colony on each new island.
description_short: Little Incrementisle is an incremental colony-building game where you land on one wild island after another. On each island, you gather resources, construct buildings, recruit villagers, and develop your colony, until you’re ready to set sail for the next one.
